title: strophanthus scandens
intro: Strophanthus scandens, also known as the climbing strophanthus or scrambling strophanthus, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include cardiotonic and diuretic effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the heart and reduce blood pressure. The health benefits of Strophanthus scandens include its potential to treat cardiovascular diseases, such as hypertension and heart failure, as well as its use in treating certain types of cancer and as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Strophanthus scandens include extracts and tinctures, which are often used to create medicinal compounds for the treatment of various health conditions.
